events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a duct installation at the rough-complete stage. The progress photos show the current checkpoint scope finished for this area, with remaining visible work being cleanup, labeling, or follow-on finish work outside the checkpoint being scored. No defects or hazards are mentioned. Reference materials are IMC 603, SMACNA, Manual D.

Since the work appears complete for the checkpoint scope with no defects flagged, this should be a pass.
